introSection: Crazy Taxi India is a steel indoor roller coaster located at Trans Studio Mini Pekalogan in Pekalongan, Central Java, Indonesia.

sections.title: Histroy
sections.content: The coaster originally opened on 27 May 1993 at Pleasure Island Family Theme Park, where it operated as Mini Mine Train. It operated until the park's closure on 29 October 2016, after which it would be dismantled and shipped to Indonesia. It was eventually reopened on 24 May 2019 at Trans Studio Mini Pekalogan in Pekalongan, Central Java, Indonesia.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: The track has red rails with yellow ties, the supports are blue. The ride used to have beige track and supports.

fullText:
Crazy Taxi India is a steel indoor roller coaster located at Trans Studio Mini Pekalogan in Pekalongan, Central Java, Indonesia.

The coaster originally opened on 27 May 1993 at Pleasure Island Family Theme Park, where it operated as Mini Mine Train. It operated until the park's closure on 29 October 2016, after which it would be dismantled and shipped to Indonesia. It was eventually reopened on 24 May 2019 at Trans Studio Mini Pekalogan in Pekalongan, Central Java, Indonesia.



The track has red rails with yellow ties, the supports are blue. The ride used to have beige track and supports.
